name: ExtensionConsent_PolicyBasis_Reference
title: R5: Reference backing policy resource additional types
description: R5: `Consent.policyBasis.reference` additional types (Reference(http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/Resource)) additional types from child elements (display, identifier, reference)
purpose:
This extension is part of the cross-version definitions generated to enable use of the
element `Consent.policyBasis.reference` as defined in FHIR R5
in FHIR R4.

The source element is defined as:
`Consent.policyBasis.reference` 0..1 `Reference(http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/Resource)`

Across FHIR versions, the element set has been mapped as:
*  R5: `Consent.policyBasis.reference` 0..1 `Reference(http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/Resource)`
*  R4B: `Consent.policy.uri` 0..1 `uri`
*  R4: `Consent.policy.uri` 0..1 `uri`

Following are the generation technical comments:
Element `Consent.policyBasis.reference` is mapped to FHIR R4 element `Consent.policy.uri` as `SourceIsBroaderThanTarget`.
The mappings for `Consent.policyBasis.reference` do not cover the following types: Reference.
The mappings for `Consent.policyBasis.reference` do not cover the following types based on type expansion: display, identifier, reference.

Element `Consent.policyBasis.reference` is mapped to FHIR R4 element `Consent.policy.uri` as `SourceIsBroaderThanTarget`.
The mappings for `Consent.policyBasis.reference` do not cover the following types: Reference.

While any resource may be used, Consent, PlanDefinition and Contract would be most frequent
